WILL MAKE SPOKANE

According to the plans recently an
nounced by President Howard Elliott
II the Northern Pacific, Spokane will


e made a very important divisional

dent Melen it was dropped to be TAX

liott was greatly impressed by what

here, and it took but little time tfor
him to determine upon the ACCESSIBILITY
of the proposed change. The plan is
to have all the Northern Pacific main
